title: Create Timeline from Formula
excerpt: Say I have two computed Start Date and End Date columns  (created from a formula) How can I create a Timeline from these two dates?

posts.author: GPG (Graeme)
posts.cookedHtml: Say I have two computed Start Date and End Date columns (created from a formula) How can I create a Timeline from these two dates?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cpg

I have an app that does this. It is triggered by a status change and then takes a start date and en end date to create a timeline. The app has a free trial period of 10 days, and maybe this is enough for you to migrate the date columns into a timeline.
